# uptimekuma_notification_smsplanet (Resource)

SMS Planet notification resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "uptimekuma_notification_smsplanet" "example" {
  name          = "SMS Planet Notifications"
  api_token     = "your-smsplanet-api-token"
  phone_numbers = "+48123456789"
  sender_name   = "UptimeKuma"
  is_active     = true
  is_default    = false
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_token` (String, Sensitive) SMS Planet API token for authentication
- `name` (String) Notification name
- `phone_numbers` (String) Recipient phone numbers

### Optional

- `apply_existing` (Boolean)
- `is_active` (Boolean)
- `is_default` (Boolean)
- `sender_name` (String) Sender name or identifier

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) Notification identifier
